synthesis:
## Decision

Adopt the Apollo Framework for the launch sequence. Coordinate with the Delta Team using the Phoenix Protocol.

## Key Decisions

- Use Apollo Framework
- Engage Delta Team
- Follow Phoenix Protocol

turns.speaker: Alice
turns.content: I recommend the Apollo Framework because it has been battle-tested. The Delta Team has experience with it.

turns.speaker: Bob
turns.content: Agreed. We should also coordinate via the Phoenix Protocol since that's what Delta Team uses internally.
